confirmed_building.scope_note: Exact mall identity confirmed before Gate 3 evidence review.

unresolved_exceptions.description: No target-specific public reoccupancy, lifting, repair-acceptance, or post-tag clearance answer was found.
unresolved_exceptions.resolution_route: Request latest clearance records from the OBO, City Engineer, owner, or engineer of record.

manual_request_targets.target: Davao City Office of the Building Official
manual_request_targets.request: Ask for any target-specific clearance after damage, tag, repair, or assessment.
manual_request_targets.reason: Clearance after a tag or damage event is often not publicly posted.

overclaim_boundary.allowed_conclusion: No public answer found for latest clearance after damage or tag after the recorded searches.
overclaim_boundary.missing_evidence_statement: The lack of a public answer does not resolve whether any offline clearance record exists.

query_log.result_summary: No target-specific public clearance answer found.
No target-specific public reoccupancy answer found.

packet_result.summary: No public answer found for latest clearance after damage or tag for the confirmed building.
